candidate_definition_hints.text: Create contours from non-gridded data with meandering triangles.

This library computes contour polygons by applying [meandering triangles](https://blog.bruce-hill.com/meandering-triangles) to an array of points with arbitrary 2D coordinates (_x_, _y_) holding numeric values _z_. To compute contours on gridded coordinates, see [d3-contour](htt…
